title: sphaerostigma hilgardii
intro: Sphaerostigma hilgardii, also known as Desert Pea or Donkey Orchid, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help treat wounds, skin irritations, and other infections. The Desert Pea has been traditionally used to promote health benefits such as soothing coughs, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Sphaerostigma hilgardii is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
